title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Acuite Ratings Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Acuite Ratings Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Acuite Ratings Holdings Services in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Acuite Ratings Holdings Services:
Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings Holdings Services!
